chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Appeal No.D-159 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 12.10.2022 Raja Jawad Ali Sahar advocate for appellant. Mr. Jangoo Khan, Special Prosecutor NAB. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi, Assistant Attorney General. ----- Appellant has been convicted and sentenced u/s 10(a) of NAO, 1999 r/w section 265-H(ii) Cr.P.C to suffer rigorous imprisonment for the period of five years and to pay fine of Rs.20,00,000/- vide impugned judgment dated 29.08.2019. Learned counsel for appellant has filed application u/s 426 CrPC on the ground that appellant has already completed entire sentence in this case and is in jail only due to nonpayment of fine, which is taken on record and office is directed to number it accordingly. Learned Special Prosecutor NAB and Assistant Attorney General have waived notice and have no objection. Appellant is in jail on account of conviction and sentence in two cases. In other case he has been awarded 10 years imprisonment. Jail roll of the appellant received today shows that appellant has physically remained in jail for 04 years and 13 days and has earned remission of 05 years 01 month and 25 days. In view of above, this application is allowed. Remaining sentence of the appellant is suspended however subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.3,00,000/- and PR Bond of the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this court. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
